emails.subject: TCR Program - Key Dates
emails.body: TCR Program Key Dates Please find attached a document listing some key TCR dates for ERCOT. The info was provided by Pamela J. Dautel, MPH Senior Analyst, Transmission Congestion and Renewables ERCOT The Texas Connection 2705 West Lake Drive Taylor, TX 76574 512-248-3955 Telephone 512-248-3995 Fax 512-657-9168 Mobile Thanks, Martin

emails.subject: Re: TCR Program - Key Dates
emails.body: Re: TCR Program Key Dates What is the deal? You staying? Doug Doug-Gilbert Smith

emails.subject: RE: TCR Program - Key Dates
emails.body: RE: TCR Program Key Dates The tentative plan is to have me working in the Fundamentals Group. Of course, as with most things of late, there are no guarantees. On a different note, I spoke with Alex regarding the load aggregation/portfolio piece. It was not intended to be part of pSim, but it's development was not completed, so that may not really matter. Martin
